patterns_recognized: Stage 1/2 high-delta (f5_full_delta >= 0.12) + negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap went 5/5 in Stage-2 direction through 5/29 — treat as bullpen-carry conviction, not a DOWNGRADE trigger. Drives MIA@WSH CONFIRM.

HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge prevention) validated on 3 directional wins on 5/30; never relax regardless of pre-cap signal quality. COL@LAA (-17.2pp), LAD@ARI (-10.3pp), NYM@SEA (-2.3pp) all stay at SKIP.
